title: JobSystem
description: 🌟 Advanced job system featuring custom levels and rewards to enhance player engagement and provide dynamic career paths on your Minecraft server. 🌟
body:
🌟 VRX JobSystem MMO 🌟

Advanced Jobs, Economy, Companies, Politics, Skills, Prestige & MMO Progression for Minecraft servers.

💬 Join our Discord for Support, Updates & Suggestions

--- ## 🚀 Latest Update — v1.0.8 **VRX JobSystem v1.0.8** is one of the biggest updates so far, focusing on **performance**, **anti-exploit protection**, **database stability**, **GUI navigation**, and long-term progression systems. ## 📖 Overview **VRX JobSystem MMO** is more than a simple jobs plugin. It transforms your Minecraft server into a deep, living economy with RPG progression, company management, politics, skill trees, prestige progression, banking, trading, quests, and long-term player motivation. Players can become miners, lumberjacks, farmers, hunters, fishermen, or crafters, while also participating in the economy through companies, auctions, stocks, banking, mayor elections, black market activities, and more. Whether your server is survival, economy, roleplay, or MMO-focused, **VRX JobSystem** gives players meaningful progression and server owners powerful control. --- ## ✨ Core Features ### 💼 Jobs & RPG Progression - **6 Core Jobs** Miner, Lumberjack, Farmer, Hunter, Fisherman, and Crafter. - **XP & Level System** Players earn XP and money by performing job-related actions. - **Actionbar Progress Display** Shows earned money, XP, level progress, and progression feedback in real time. - **Skill Trees** Players unlock skill paths such as: - Money bonuses - XP bonuses - Special job perks - Auto-smelt - Double rewards - Rare drops - **Job Milestones** Configure rewards for specific job levels, including: - Money - Commands - Permissions - Custom progression rewards - **Prestige System** Players can prestige after reaching high job levels and gain permanent progression bonuses. - **Prestige Talent Tree** Prestige points can unlock powerful long-term talents. - **Job Synergies** Reward players for combining specific jobs with configurable bonus multipliers. - **Battle Pass Rewards** Players can claim milestone rewards through a clean GUI. --- ## 🏢 Companies & Stock Market Create powerful companies, manage employees, issue shares, and dominate the economy. ### Company Features - Create and manage companies - Invite and kick members - Custom company roles - Role permission editor - Company headquarters - Company vaults - Company bank - Company upgrades - Company boosters - Dynamic member limits - Company specialization - Dividends - Stock market - Share issuing - Hostile takeovers - Corporate sabotage ### Stock Market Company owners can issue shares, while players can invest in companies and earn dividends. If a player owns more than 50% of a company’s shares, they can trigger a hostile takeover. --- ## 🛒 Global Auction House A secure player-to-player trading system. ### Auction House Features - Sell items with `/job ah sell ` - Paginated auction GUI - Secure item storage - Supports custom names, lore, enchantments, and NBT data - Listing fees - Expired auction cleanup - Seller notifications - Audit logging for auction actions --- ## 🏦 Banking & Daily Rewards ### Banking - Deposit money into the central bank - Withdraw custom amounts - Earn passive interest - Chat-based amount input - Configurable interest rate and interval ### Daily Rewards - Daily login reward system - Streak-based bonus rewards - Configurable base reward and streak bonus - Long-term activity incentive --- ## 🏛️ Politics & Mayor System Let your players control the server economy. ### Mayor Features - Run for mayor - Server-wide tax system - Tax vault - Change global tax rate - Use taxes for server-wide benefits - Activate global boosters - Trigger weather changes - Manage political influence through gameplay --- ## 🏴‍☠️ Black Market & Illegal Activities For servers that want risk-based gameplay and underground economy features. ### Black Market - Opens only at night - Rotating sell offers - Configurable items and payouts - Smuggling missions - Corporate sabotage - High-risk, high-reward gameplay ### Smuggling Players can pay to start a smuggling mission and must deliver contraband to random coordinates while glowing. Successful runs offer high rewards, but the risk is high. --- ## 🛡️ Anti-Exploit Protection VRX JobSystem includes multiple systems to prevent farming and economy abuse. ### Protection Features - Prevents payouts from cancelled block break events - Tracks placed blocks - Uses optimized block position tracking - Detects and limits repeated same-location rewards - Prevents protected-claim payout exploits - Supports optional protection hooks - Blocks spawner-based farming rewards - Adds cooldowns for: - Blocks - Crops - Fishing - Mob farming - Crafting spam - Improved protection checks for special perks like Timber ### Supported Protection Plugins Soft support is included for: - WorldGuard - GriefPrevention - Lands - Towny - Residence - PlotSquared The plugin does not require these hooks to run. They are optional and safely detected. --- ## ⚡ Performance & Stability Version 1.0.8 includes major performance improvements. ### Performance Improvements - Snapshot-based async database saving - Save queue with debounce - Safer shutdown saving - Reward buffering to reduce Vault calls - Optimized placed-block tracking using dedicated block position records - Reduced unnecessary object creation - Improved random handling - GUI logic improved with custom inventory holders - Reduced reliance on translated GUI titles - More stable long-term database migrations --- ## 🧰 Admin & Moderation Tools ### Admin Commands - `/job admin reload` - `/job admin inspect ` - `/job debug` - `/job version` ### Admin Features - Inspect player job data - Check active jobs - View levels, XP, prestige, and skills - View company and bank information - View daily streak and progression data - Use audit logs to investigate suspicious economy activity ### Audit Logs The plugin can log important actions such as: - Job earnings - Admin actions - Auction house actions - Company bank actions - Booster actions - Milestone claims - Prestige talent unlocks Example log files: logs/jobs.log logs/company-bank.log logs/admin-actions.log logs/auctionhouse.log --- ## 🌐 Multi-Language Support Included languages: - 🇺🇸 English - 🇩🇪 German Messages are fully configurable and loaded dynamically from the selected language file. --- ## 🔌 Integrations ### Supported Integrations - Vault - PlaceholderAPI - MiniMessage - bStats Metrics - WorldGuard - GriefPrevention - Lands - Towny - Residence - PlotSquared ### PlaceholderAPI The plugin includes expanded PlaceholderAPI support for job stats, company data, prestige, levels, and more. --- ## ⌨️ Commands & Permissions | Command / Feature | Description | Permission | | :--- | :--- | :--- | | `/job` | Opens the main Job Center | `jobsystem.use` | | `/job help` | Shows help menu | `jobsystem.use` | | `/job version` | Shows plugin version | `jobsystem.use` | | `/job debug` | Shows debug information | `jobsystem.admin` | | `/job leave ` | Leave a job with confirmation | `jobsystem.use` | | `/job skills ` | Opens the skill menu | `jobsystem.skills` | | `/job talents ` | Opens prestige talents | `jobsystem.prestige` | | `/job prestige ` | Prestige a job | `jobsystem.prestige` | | `/job top ` | View leaderboards | `jobsystem.top` | | `/job daily` | Claim daily reward | `jobsystem.daily` | | `/job quest` | Open quest menu | `jobsystem.quest` | | `/job rewards` | Open rewards menu | `jobsystem.rewards` | | `/job bank` | Open bank menu | `jobsystem.bank` | | `/job ah` | Open Auction House | `jobsystem.use` | | `/job ah sell ` | Sell held item in Auction House | `jobsystem.use` | | `/job company` | Open company menu | `jobsystem.company.use` | | `/job company create ` | Create a company | `jobsystem.company.create` | | `/job company takeover ` | Start hostile takeover | `jobsystem.company.takeover` | | `/job stocks` | Open stock market | `jobsystem.stocks` | | `/job mayor` | Open mayor menu | `jobsystem.mayor` | | `/job admin reload` | Reload plugin configs | `jobsystem.admin` | | `/job admin inspect ` | Inspect player job data | `jobsystem.admin` | | `/job booster ...` | Manage boosters | `jobsystem.admin` | | `/fc ` | Company chat | `jobsystem.chat` | --- ## 📦 Dependencies & Installation ### Required 1. **Vault** 2. An economy plugin, for example: - VRX Economy - EssentialsX - CMI - Any Vault-compatible economy plugin ### Optional but Recommended - PlaceholderAPI - WorldGuard - GriefPrevention - Lands - Towny - Residence - PlotSquared ### Installation 1. Download the plugin. 2. Place the `.jar` file into your server’s `plugins` folder. 3. Install Vault and a Vault-compatible economy plugin. 4. Restart your server. 5. Edit the generated config files if needed. 6. Enjoy a complete MMO-style jobs and economy system. --- ## 🧩 Compatibility - Minecraft `1.20` to `1.26+` - Java `17` - Paper recommended - No NMS or CraftBukkit internals - Future-friendly architecture for newer Minecraft versions --- ## 💬 Support & Community Need help, found a bug, or want to suggest a feature? Join our Discord community for support, updates, previews, and suggestions. 👉 **[Join the Official Discord Server](https://discord.gg/sFVd9JNpS2)** ---

🌟 Build a real economy. Reward progression. Create long-term motivation. 🌟

VRX JobSystem MMO — Jobs, Companies, Skills, Prestige, Politics & Economy in one plugin.
